pi_items.source: setup_task.sh cleans old cases matching /home/ga/Cases/SAR_GPS_2024*/ and export_result.sh searches for the same pattern to locate the Autopsy database.
Explicitly defined in the task description prompt as the case number to be used, though not strictly checked by the verifier.
setup_task.sh dynamically synthesizes a FAT32 image at this exact path containing the synthetic GPX file.
export_result.sh expects the CSV to be exported to this specific file path and assesses its presence and modification time.
export_result.sh checks for this exact file path and verifier.py parses its contents for the required output values.
export_result.sh writes its evaluation state to this path and verifier.py reads from it.
setup_task.sh generates this file with ground truth values (lat 44.4301, lon -110.5915, 4 trackpoints) and verifier.py uses it for scoring.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetically generated data created by setup_task.sh, which dynamically builds a FAT32 disk image containing a GPX file. Verified that the GPX file contains exactly 4 trackpoints, with the most recent trackpoint corresponding to 2024-05-12T15:30:00Z at latitude 44.430100 and longitude -110.591500. All file paths for evidence, export, and reporting exactly match the task requirements and verifier expectations.
